_comment: Plugin hooks. Auto-registered when the autopsy plugin is enabled. The command probes for a working interpreter the same way install/enable does -- python3 first, falling back to python -- because a static 'python3' hits the Windows Store stub that resolves but exits 49. A shell that cannot run this degrades to a non-blocking no-op (the stop proceeds); enforcement is best-effort, never load-bearing. See hooks/check_banner_relay.py.
